content.query:
SELECT TOP (100) [CalendarDate]
,[DayOfWeek]
,[Month]
,[Quarter]
,[Year]
 FROM [EDW].[DIM_CALENDAR]
 where year([CalendarDate]) in ('2024','2025')
 order by [CalendarDate] 


 select * from (select * ,
 row_number() over (partition by year,month order by calendardate) as bussiness_day
  from  [EDW].[DIM_CALENDAR]
 where dayofweek not in(1,7)) t1
 where t1. bussiness_day = 2
 and year = 2024
 order by calendardate desc
